case_title: JENNIFER LAZORACK VS. PROM & PEGEANT EXPOSITIONS LLC, A CALIFORNIA

docket_entries.description: REQUEST THAT CLERK ENTER JUDGMENT ON FINAL ORDER, DECISION OR AWARD OF THE LABOR COMMISSIONER FILED BY PLAINTIFF LAZORACK, JENNIFER AS TO DEFENDANT PROM & PEGEANT EXPOSITIONS LLC, A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
